languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

languages.text: "Тот, кто способен собирать самых опасных противников в галактике словно коллекционер, вряд ли прельстился бы большим количеством мон-кайских творений".
"Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."
languages.original_text: "Тот, кто способен собирать самых опасных противников в галактике словно коллекционер, вряд ли прельстился бы большим количеством мон-кайских творений".

traits.locale_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."
"Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."
"Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

languages.text: 「銀河最強の敵を集める収集家のような能力を持つ者は、大量のモンケィグの創造物に誘惑されることは少ないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: 銀河最強の敵を集める収集家のような能力を持つ者は、大量のモンケィグの創造物に誘惑されることは少ないだろう。

languages.text: « Je crois que la plupart des créations des mon-keigh seraient sans intérêt pour quelqu'un capable de collectionner les ennemis les plus dangereux de la galaxie. »
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: « Je crois que la plupart des créations des mon-keigh seraient sans intérêt pour quelqu'un capable de collectionner les ennemis les plus dangereux de la galaxie. »

languages.text: "Jemand mit der Fähigkeit, die tödlichsten Gegner der Galaxie zu versammeln, lässt sich von einer großen Zahl von Chem-Pan-Sey-Kreationen vermutlich nicht in Versuchung führen."
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: "Jemand mit der Fähigkeit, die tödlichsten Gegner der Galaxie zu versammeln, lässt sich von einer großen Zahl von Chem-Pan-Sey-Kreationen vermutlich nicht in Versuchung führen."

languages.text: "Galaksideki en ölümcül düşmanları bir koleksiyoncu gibi toplama yeteneğine sahip birinin, çok sayıda mon-keigh yaratımı tarafından cezbedilmesi pek olası değildir."
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: "Galaksideki en ölümcül düşmanları bir koleksiyoncu gibi toplama yeteneğine sahip birinin, çok sayıda mon-keigh yaratımı tarafından cezbedilmesi pek olası değildir."

languages.text: «No creo que las creaciones de los mon-keigh, por numerosas que sean, basten para tentar a alguien que es capaz de reunir a los enemigos más mortíferos de la galaxia como si de un coleccionista se tratase».
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: «No creo que las creaciones de los mon-keigh, por numerosas que sean, basten para tentar a alguien que es capaz de reunir a los enemigos más mortíferos de la galaxia como si de un coleccionista se tratase».

languages.text: “有能力像收藏家一样将银河中最致命的敌人搜罗起来的人，不太可能被大量猴子造物所吸引。”
languages.original_text: "Someone with the ability to gather the deadliest foes in the galaxy like a collector is unlikely to be tempted by a large number of mon-keigh creations."

traits.locale_text: “有能力像收藏家一样将银河中最致命的敌人搜罗起来的人，不太可能被大量猴子造物所吸引。”
